target_table_design.notes: Persistence requires projection from audit-rich candidate records to strict schema fields.

referenced_taxon_dependencies.notes: Relationships referencing reftaxon:inaturalist:* require stable referenced taxon storage lifecycle before writes.

validation_errors.detail: All candidate records contain audit-only fields not allowed by distractor_relationship_v1 schema.

steps: Export existing distractor_relationships rows before any write
Apply writes in single transaction per chunk
On validation or referential error, rollback full transaction
Store before/after hashes and conflict report
